title: Integrated habits task
objective: Describir y comparar hábitos usando adverbios de frecuencia.

activities.prompt: I always walk, but my brother rarely walks. He usually takes the bus.

activities.feedback_correct: Con be, el adverbio va después.
Usually va antes del verbo principal.

activities.prompt: I always cook. He sometimes cooks. They never cook.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Marca los adverbios y la terminación de cooks.

activities.prompt: Lena always studies in the morning. She sometimes studies at night. Her brother never studies at night.
activities.question: Who never studies at night?

activities.prompt: Compare your habits with another person's using eight sentences.
activities.feedback_correct: La comparación muestra diferencias de frecuencia.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa adverbio con verbo principal y con be.

activities.prompt: Discuss exercise, food, study and sleep frequency with the AI.
activities.feedback_correct: La IA evalúa precisión y naturalidad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA corrige una prioridad por turno.

activities.prompt: Describe five habits and how often you do them without reading.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Organiza la respuesta desde always hasta never.

activities.prompt: Ask three How often questions, describe five habits and compare one person.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Repasa posición y significado del adverbio que causó dificultad.
